newspaper: Unknown (Likely Rio de Janeiro based on the source)
original_snippet_context: Discussion of exchange rates, agio, and their impact on coffee farmers and wages.
relevant_quote: Entretanto, a volta, aqui, a cansada questão dos salarios, que, effectivamente, teem sofrido a quebra com a quebra do padrão...
justification: The mention of "quebra do padrão" (breakdown of the standard) suggests a negative view of the current monetary situation, implying a preference for a more stable, gold-backed standard, which aligns with orthodox thinking.
